title: pterogastra divaricata var. glabra
intro: Pterogastra divaricata var. glabra is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a hairless version of the Pterogastra divaricata plant. Pterogastra divaricata var. glabra has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to its medicinal properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies, offering potential health benefits such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation.
